title: Wireless Design, Configuration, and Validation
description: Design staff, guest, and point-to-point wireless service across crowded, regulated, and mobile spaces. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a secure wireless survey and deployment plan while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose bands, channels, widths, antennas, and AP architecture from measured requirements.
Configure identities, encryption, authentication, guest isolation, and roaming.
Validate coverage, capacity, interference, and client behavior rather than signal alone.
